params.description:
On Mar 14, 1937, Picasso created this gloomy and depressing giant painting.

This painting expressed the artist's opposition to war and massacre. He used realistic techniques and simple colors to create a gloomy and tragic tone. The design and composition of this painting seem casual and even a little messy. It reflects the chaotic situations of people panicking and fleeing away from bombs at the time. With this well-organized composition, the seemingly exaggerated and deformed images is actuall …
